data.title: Nvidia's AI Reign Under Threat: These 4 Memory Stocks Are Now Leading The Chip Rally
data.description: Throughout the last five years, Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) stood out as a significant player in the semiconductor market. However, a notable shift is occurring now, clearly indicated by the relative performance chart. Over a three-year period tracked by TradingView, the dominance of Nvidia in early 2023 to mid-April 2025 is evident, with memory stocks trailing behind as the market heavily favored AI compute technology. This scenario changed in the latter half of 2025, as SanDisk Corp. (NASDAQ: SNDK), Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: WDC), Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (NASDAQ: STX), and Micron Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MU) have steadily been regaining traction. These four memory-focused companies are currently surpassing Nvidia in performance over a three-year period. The acceleration of this trend within the chipmaker industry has been particularly notable since the onset of the Iran war on February 28. Data from Benzinga Pro tracking regular-session movements from that date onwards depict a rapid amplification of the shift.

data.title: Element Solutions Inc Announces Date for 2026 First Quarter Earnings Release
data.description: Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI) has revealed plans to unveil its first-quarter financial results for 2026 on April 28, 2026, following the market's closure. A conference call discussing these results will be hosted at 8:30 a.m. (ET) on April 29, 2026. The call will feature CEO Benjamin Gliklich and CFO Carey J. Dorman.

data.title: First Patients Dosed with Cabaletta Bio’s Rese-cel Manufactured on Cellares' Automated Cell Shuttle™ Platform
data.description: In South San Francisco, Cellares, an Integrated Development and Manufacturing Organization (IDMO), revealed the successful infusion of Cabaletta Bio Inc.’s investigational CAR T cell therapy, rese-cel (resecabtagene autoleucel), into the initial two patients. This was made possible using drug product manufactured on Cellares' Cell Shuttle™ automated manufacturing platform. Cabaletta Bio, listed on Nasdaq as CABA, achieved this milestone in autologous cell therapy administration, meeting all necessary release standards.

data.title: At ASU+GSV, America Achieves Demonstrates Early Progress on Good Jobs Economy Core Commitments
data.description: Today at the ASU+GSV Summit, a national nonprofit organization called America Achieves revealed new initiatives aimed at supporting workforce development in Western North Carolina. The program, named Good Jobs Western North Carolina, includes tools and resources to assist state leaders in improving job opportunities in the region. Additionally, significant private and philanthropic investments have been secured to further this initiative. This announcement comes amidst a backdrop of increasing focus on job creation and economic growth, with an estimated investment of $X by private and philanthropic partners in the venture. The launch of Good Jobs Western North Carolina marks a significant step forward in addressing the workforce needs of the region and fostering economic development.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Reminds Non-Canadian Taxable Shareholders of "Opt-Out" Alternative for Return of Capital
data.description: Investors holding Thomson Reuters shares (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) outside Canada must act promptly to opt out. Deadlines differ by intermediary, some before April 27, 2026. The company, based in Toronto, issued this reminder on April 14, 2026.

data.title: Uber Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) is set to host its quarterly conference call to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6th at 5:00 a.m. PT (8:00 a.m. ET). The live webcast of the call and related earnings documents will be available on the Investor Relations page of Uber’s website at investor.uber.com. An archive of the call will be available for a minimum of 90 days for those unable to tune in live. Uber stated its intention to abide by disclosure guidelines.

data.title: Mark Herr Communications Issues Statement Regarding the Seventh Circuit’s Decision to Grant Bail to Anne Pramaggiore
data.description: Anne Pramaggiore, a former executive, has been granted bail after three months in prison due to a new trial being ordered by the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals. This decision was influenced by recent Supreme Court rulings that dismissed the government's arguments. The swift action of the Seventh Circuit in granting bail is appreciated, and it is noted that Pramaggiore's imprisonment, which has lasted for three months, is deemed unjust given the circumstances of the case.

data.title: CoW Swap DAO advises users to avoid site due to 'hijacking', warns against accessing platform following frontend exploit.
data.description: Following a frontend exploit, the decentralized exchange aggregator is cautioning users against visiting its website.

data.title: HYPE reaches 2026 peak with $45 price, but weak spot volume and rising leverage suggest market momentum could wane.
data.description: The value of HYPE surged to $45, marking a significant increase. However, reports indicate low trading volumes in key areas and an uptick in the utilization of leverage, suggesting that the current market momentum may soon diminish.

data.title: Novellia Wins 2026 Fierce Outsourcing Award for Innovation in Drug Development
data.description: Novellia's groundbreaking patient-authorized real-world data (RWD) platform is being acknowledged for its significant impact on advancing biopharma research. The platform is built solely on data voluntarily provided by patients for medical research. The recognition was received in New York on April 14, 2026, elevating Novellia's status as a major player in this field. This platform showcases a unique approach by allowing patients to actively contribute, ultimately shaping the future of biopharma research.
